notes: No official numeric CSV files are tracked until both native quantitative runs pass.
An independent MATLAB R2025b oracle using Garrappa fde12.m revisions from 2012 and 2025 matched the native C RF result but did not recover the RF vector printed in the 2018 article.
RF remains outside the published absolute tolerance of 0.05, so no numeric CSV files are promoted.
This lane does not validate fractional_variational_abm_qr.
